headline: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Is Down 11.0% After Cutting 2026 Output Outlook On Grasberg Delays
summary: Earlier this month, Freeport-McMoRan Inc. declared a total cash dividend of US$0.15 per share for its common stock, split evenly between a US$0.075 base dividend and a US$0.075 variable dividend, payable on August 3, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 15, 2026, under its performance-based payout framework. Away from capital returns, the company’s decision to lower its 2026 production outlook due to Grasberg mine delays highlights how operational execution risk can directly influence...

headline: Forget Southern Copper: 1 Domestic Copper King to Buy Hand Over Fist as the Global Supply Crunch Intensifies
summary: Southern Copper (NYSE:SCCO) is the name on every commodity desk’s lips right now, with the stock up 73.95% over the past year on the back of a screaming copper tape. Southern Copper is the wrong vehicle for the copper supercycle, and the market is starting to figure it out. The stock has already slid 11.23% ... Forget Southern Copper: 1 Domestic Copper King to Buy Hand Over Fist as the Global Supply Crunch Intensifies

headline: Buried in Practice Investigates Missing US State Department Human Rights Report on Freeport-McMoRan in West Papua
summary: Buried in Practice: Freeport in West Papua, Indonesia—and the State Department Human Rights Report That Disappeared draws attention to new research into a publicly acknowledged 1995–96 US State Department human rights investigation into Freeport-McMoRan's operations in West Papua, Indonesia, and asks why the investigation's interim and final reports remain missing or unreleased three decades later. Written by former Wall Street mining analyst John C. Wilson, the investigative work draws on more
